ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "platform" INTEGER /* ID of the platform where the game is available */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the game was released */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer of the game */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "rating" TEXT /* ESRB rating of the game */,
  "price" REAL /* Base price of the game */,
  "is_free_to_play" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game is free to play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_mode FOREIGN KEY ("mode") REFERENCES modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_platform FOREIGN KEY ("platform") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "operating_systems" TEXT /* Supported operating systems */,
  "device_types" TEXT /* Types of devices supported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players in multiplayer modes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform the user primarily uses */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "subscription_tier" TEXT /* Subscription tier of the user (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_games" (
  "user_game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user's game play */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user playing the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "playtime" INTEGER /* Total playtime in minutes */,
  "last_played_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last played the game */,
  "level" INTEGER /* User's level in the game */,
  "achievements" INTEGER /* Number of achievements unlocked by the user */,
  "progress" TEXT /* User's progress in the game (e.g., percentage completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_games_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_games_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "in_game_purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the purchase */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game where the purchase was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount spent on the purchase */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase was made */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific item purchased */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the purchased item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., skin, weapon, boost) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_in_game_purchases_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_in_game_purchases_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user leaving the review */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being reviewed */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of unhelpful votes the review has received */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game's engagement metrics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "total_playtime" INTEGER /* Total playtime across all users */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating across all user reviews */,
  "total_purchases" INTEGER /* Total number of in-game purchases */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of user reviews */,
  "active_users" INTEGER /* Number of active users in the last 30 days */,
  "new_users" INTEGER /* Number of new users in the last 30 days */,
  "churn_rate" REAL /* Churn rate of users */,
  "average_session_duration" REAL /* Average session duration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_engagement_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_platforms" (
  "user_platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user's platform access */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the platform */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the specific device used by the user */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_platforms_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_platforms_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game update */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being updated */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "patch_notes" TEXT /* Detailed patch notes for the update */,
  "download_size" REAL /* Size of the update file */,
  "is_major" INTEGER /* Indicates if the update is a major release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_updates_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game download */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user downloading the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being downloaded */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date the game was downloaded */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the downloaded game file in MB */,
  "download_speed" REAL /* Download speed in Mbps */,
  "download_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the download in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_downloads_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_ads" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertisement */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being advertised */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user seeing the advertisement */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of times the ad was shown to the user */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of times the ad was clicked by the user */,
  "ad_date" TEXT /* Date the ad was shown */,
  "ad_type" TEXT /* Type of the ad (e.g., banner, video) */,
  "ad_cost" REAL /* Cost of the ad */,
  "ad_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the ad in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_ads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_ads_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
